title: Senior Software Engineer - DeHaat - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - DeHaat - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
DeHaat invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DeHaat:
DeHaat is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DeHaat!
